channel.title: healthTest
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from healthTest, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Improved Early Environments Linked to Better Outcomes in Adopted Children
item.description: Research finds adopted individuals raised in more favorable conditions showed stronger long-term psychosocial outcomes than their unadopted biological siblings.

item.title: Researchers Study the Gut Microbiome's Role in Rising Colorectal Cancer Rates
item.description: Colorectal cancer is increasingly affecting younger adults. Researchers are investigating gut microbiome factors that may help explain the trend.

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind April 27, 2026
item.description: This week's research summary includes findings on daytime napping patterns and all-cause mortality risk in older adults, among other recent studies.

item.title: Researchers Study the Gut Microbiome's Role in Rising Colorectal Cancer Rates
item.description: Colorectal cancer is increasingly affecting younger adults. Researchers are investigating gut microbiome factors that may help explain the trend.
